case_title: JESSICA BODDORFF VS. LEV LOEVSKY ET AL

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BODDORFF, JESSICA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LOEVSKY, LEV LOEVSKY, GEORGIY AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST SAMANTHA SIERRA CRISTAL IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVE THAT SHE PURCHASED THE 2001 ISUZU RODEO (LICENSE #4UGY822) VEHICLE FROM DEFENDANTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $65.00) SERVED FEB-16-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOEVSKY, GEORGIY
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF BODDORFF, JESSICA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-03-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO APR-27-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS WERE PRESENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY BODDORFF, JESSICA AS TO DEFENDANT LOEVSKY, LEV LOEVSKY, GEORGIY CRISTAL, SAMANTHA SIERRA
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BODDORFF, JESSICA AS TO DEFENDANT CRISTAL, SAMANTHA SIERRA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-27-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-27-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF JESSICA BODDORFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS LEV LOEVSKY AND GEORGIY LOEVSKY ARE PRESENT. BOTH DEFENDANTS WAIVE SERVICE OF THE CLAIM. DEFENDANT SAMANTHA SIERRA CRISTAL IS NOT PRESENT AND AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINITFF WILL BE DISMISSED FOR LACK OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY BODDORFF, JESSICA AS TO DEFENDANT LOEVSKY, LEV LOEVSKY, GEORGIY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-2017 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-27-2017 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $65.00) SERVED FEB-16-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOEVSKY, LEV
COPYING FEES (4 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF BODDORFF, JESSICA
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF RE: FILING AN AMENDED CLAIM ADDING SAMANTHA SIERRA CRISTAL AS AN ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT TO HER CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF BODDORFF, JESSICA
